item.potionrelicsmod.heroofthevillagerel: Relic of Hero Of The Village
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.absorptionrelic: Electrifies your heart to beat twice as fast.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dolphinsgracerel: You are accompanied by the soul of a dolphin condensed into gold.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dragonrelic: A splinter of the dragon's dominion over the End still answers to you.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dragonrelic_roar: Dragon Roar: Right click to blast nearby players away.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dragonrelic_reca: Void Recall: Falling into the void returns you to your last grounded position.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.dragonrelic_ward: Dragon Ward: Lethal damage becomes a brief invulnerable stasis field.
Dragon Ward only triggers if Dragon Roar and Void Recall are both ready.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.fireresistancere: The fire inside you burns brighter then the heat around you.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.hasterelic: Blocks tremble under your pickaxe's might.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.heroofthevillage: Villagers of all villages bow before you.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.invisibilityreli: Every cell in your body gains the iridophores of a chameleon.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.jumpboostrelic: Rabbits, frogs, and kangaroos are jealous of your jump height.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.nightvisionrelic: Grants sight even in the darkest of nights.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.regenerationreli: Your wounds heal faster than you can feel their pain.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.saturationrelic: Just looking at the chicken on the plate fills your stomach.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.slowfallingrelic: Your feet are like leaves in the fall.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.strengthrelic: Turns you into a one man army.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.swiftnessrelic: Muscle fibers contract at incredible speed.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.waterbreathingre: The sea itself empowers you with underwater sight, speed, and breathing.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.toggle_held: Shift + Right Click while held to toggle.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.toggle_inventory: Hover in inventory and press V to toggle.
tooltip.potionrelicsmod.invisibilityreli: Hides the held relic, arm, and player model while active.
message.potionrelicsmod.dragon_void_reca: Void Recall drags you back from the abyss.
message.potionrelicsmod.dragon_ward: Dragon Ward locks you inside a stationary force field.
message.potionrelicsmod.relic_shrine_inv: You need an open inventory slot to claim this relic.
message.potionrelicsmod.relic_shrine_hin: %s was lost. A shrine has formed near X %s, Z %s.
command.potionrelicsmod.invalid_relic: That is not a valid relic.
command.potionrelicsmod.dragon_apparitio: Spawned the dragon apparition for %s ticks.
command.potionrelicsmod.scatter_success: Placed %s of %s relic shrines around %s %s %s (min %s, max %s).
command.potionrelicsmod.scatter_area_suc: Placed %s of %s relic shrines between (%s, %s) and (%s, %s) with auto spacing %s.
command.potionrelicsmod.lineup_success: Placed %s of %s relic shrines in a lineup starting near %s %s %s with spacing %s.
